title: IoT Live Sensor Panel (Task 2.5 bonus)
description: Grafana dashboard over the DynamoDB table (iot-hack-timeseries) populated by lambda-dynamodb/handler.py every minute from Snowflake CLEAN.IOT_VALIDATED. Originally targeted AWS Timestream per the brief, but Timestream for LiveAnalytics is closed to new AWS accounts (confirmed via a live `cdk deploy` attempt: 'Only existing Timestream for LiveAnalytics customers can access the service', HandlerErrorCode: GeneralServiceException). Import via Grafana's dashboard JSON import after installing the community 'marcusolsson-dynamodb-datasource' plugin and adding a DynamoDB data source (table: iot-hack-timeseries, partition key: device_id, sort key: event_time).

targets.note: One target per device_id, or use a Grafana repeat-panel/variable over the known device-00N ids - DynamoDB Query requires an exact partition key, unlike SQL's WHERE IN.
